known_limitations: Single ES physical host: cross-host shard-awareness assertion skipped (only meaningful with 2+ hosts)
ES HTTP TLS disabled in the lab to avoid cross-AWX-job ephemeral CA (transport TLS + native-realm auth remain on)
LDAP group->role auto-mapping not exercised (lab OpenLDAP has no memberOf overlay); any authenticated directory user is authorized
